title: Number Systems, Signed Quantities, and Reliable Operations · Mixed Practice Return
summary: Reconcile inventory gains, losses, temperatures, elevations, and account changes from mixed records. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a signed-quantity inventory reconciliation after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Classify natural, whole, integer, rational, irrational, and real numbers by the operations a model needs.
Use place value, scientific notation, and powers of ten to compare very large and very small quantities.
Model direction and change with signed numbers and explain each operation on a number line.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
